description_long: This humanoid robot features a metallic, angular body with a rectangular torso and a flat, polygonal head. Its arms are long and jointed, ending in propeller-like appendages, and are raised in a dynamic, expressive pose. The legs are mechanical and segmented, with visible joints at the hips, knees, and ankles, and flat, rectangular feet for stability. The robot's surface is primarily composed of dark, reflective metal panels with some lighter metallic accents, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible facial features or display screens on the head, and the overall design emphasizes mechanical articulation and movement. The construction suggests a robust, functional robot suited for urban environments.
description: A metallic humanoid robot with angular limbs, jointed arms ending in propeller-like hands, and a flat, featureless head. Its industrial design features dark reflective metal panels and articulated legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's rectangular torso, raised arms with propeller-like ends, and mechanical legs facing forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the flat head, angular torso, and the full extension of the left arm upward, with visible leg joints.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the torso, both arms raised outward, and the mechanical structure of the legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the right arm extended forward, the flat head, and the segmented leg structure.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms raised and extended outward, one arm higher than the other, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metallic panels with no visible coverings or decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; head is flat and polygonal with no eyes, mouth, or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands end in propeller-like structures, and limbs appear rigid but articulated.
